_readme: PLACEHOLDER DATA. Replace every row with the real 15 pre-warmed inboxes (domains, DNS status, actual dates) before scripts/scaling_calendar.py or the dashboard scaling panel mean anything. cohort_start_date = day the inbox entered warmup in Instantly. status: warming | live | rested. Once INSTANTLY_API_KEY is set, dashboard/server.py can pull this straight from the Instantly /accounts endpoint instead of this file -- this file remains useful for domains/DNS status Instantly doesn't track (SPF/DKIM/DMARC verification, purchase records).

cohorts.note: The 15 pre-warmed inboxes being imported per Section 1. Fill in real domains above, then this cohort entry can be derived from them.
